subject: [PATCH pynfs 04/13] server41tests: test OFFLOAD_STATUS persists after async copy completes

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to verify that the OFFLOAD_STATUS persists after an asynchronous copy completes. The test performs an async copy, waits for completion, and then re-queries OFFLOAD_STATUS after a delay to ensure the server still returns valid copy state. This catches a kernel bug where the async copy reaper incorrectly destroys the copy state on the first laundromat tick after completion instead of waiting for the full TTL window.
